TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_liel_nu_tawawaan_masumad_ku_labuay_a_banges_nu_pucu‚Äô, title = liel_nu_tawawaan_masumad_ku_labuay_a_banges_nu_pucu‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/liel_nu_tawawaan_masumad_ku_labuay_a_banges_nu_pucu‚Äô} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu'. Śģģť†łšłäÁöģŚÖßÁė§ś®£ÁóÖŤģä liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' "kamu nu Ing, "Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia, CIN" singangan aca tu u cayay ka tabaki liel nu tawawaan "kamu nu Ing, cervical dysplasia" anucaay pucu' a liel nu tawawaana "cervical interstitial neoplasia", liel nu tawawaana u caya katabaki atu liel nu tawawaana masakinasay a si-paw pulung nu ngangan tu tizaay a gang, u silamitay tu a gang ayaw nu gang a masumad. liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' caay ku gang, taneng a mingaay. . nilaculan hatu liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu', nika caay kakatuud ku mala gangay a liel nu tawawaan. sakahin u CIN angangan makayniay bayduk nu tacucuay nu tademaw tu "HPV" i liel nu tawawaan haymaw satu malalid, micide talakaw ku kalalid 16 anucaay 18 HPV. .ŚľēŤĶ∑CIN (HPV) 16śąĖ18ŚěčHPV. i bwahngu saayaway maazih a imelang u liel nu tawawaan pabaw nu banges a sipaw anucaay hekal malawcu', saaca i labu a uzip nu tatayna caay kaazih. i HPV akalalid zikuz tanengn maazih ku kasumad nu si-paw, mahiniay kutkutan ku si-paw "pangangan han tu "makulemian ku si-paw" mahiniay maazih tu ku kasumad a liel nu tawawaan labuay a banges nu pucu'. liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' nikaawas tu pikinsa a maazih, mahiniay maawas pa-s a nisasing mikinsa tu liel nu tawawaan, ayaw a mikinsa hakay u gang. makinsa anu caay kakapay, amibwahngu patabaki tu tawawaan, anucaay makay uzip mikelit a mikinsa. .Śú®HPV . lalekalan nu imelang ÁóÖŚõ† liel nu tawawaan labuay nu banges a pucu' nikasumad nu imelang sakas haw masasibut, uyni a imelang mahapinang nu makayniay u alip hanay, malali "katalawan" mahiniay u bayduk nu tacucuay nu tademaw, "mahiniay saka 16,18,31,45 kasahini" nu tatayna, hinalaliday a tatayna ayaw nu 17 ku mihcaan nu tatayna siwawa. namahini uzuma sakatalawan amasumad ku liel nu tawawaan labuay nu banges a pucu', pasu mikudus tu uzip, katuud ku cabay, caay picukaymas tu paw-syen-taw, siuning tu pang, katuud ku nilecuh, mapela' ku liel nu tawawaan atu mitabaku. sakay CINI nu imelangay, caay paising kapahtu sa pacena' amingaay. uyzasa u imelanga kapipaising tu, pademiaden amikinsa tu liel nu tawawaan mapelu' ku su-paw-sye atu mibwahngu mikinsa tu labu nu puki. anu i 12 a buladan, caliway tu kinapina ku pikingsa masumad ku imelang kalalid tu mikinsa, a malingatu mingaay. ŚįćśĖľCIN1 . sakay katuud ku tanengay a macunus ku cayay kaazih, sisa pihacengay nu cayay kaazih ku kacunus atu sigangay, kalamkamen mingaay, zuma pasu cudetay ku sapituduh, hanu dingkien mituduh, liel nu tawawaan u masaimuluay a akiti' nu dingki ku sapicici' anucaay u cuya ku sapicici' tu liel nu tawawaan.sapingaay a imi u HPV yubciwsia mitanam henay. liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' cici'en mingaay hakay caay kasibili anucaay caay ka siwawa macunus ku katalawan. hina asa liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' kilul tu mangaleb malagang mahiniay makay alip ku kasahini. nika katuud ku patinakuan tu liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' caay paisingen kapah satu. CINI nu imelangay pakala tu 70% pesen cacay a mihcaan kapahsatu, 90% pesen i tusa a mihcaan kapahsau. pakala tu50 % pesen ku CIN2 nu imelangay i tusa a mihcaan kapahtu. pihacengay malagang mahiniay palalecad 15 a mihcaan "3 katukuh 40 a mihcaan" ku demiad. tahkal ku nisulitan, gang a imelang hakay saayaway mikinsa anucaay u caay ka imelangay u cayay henay kaazih, a pabesut u pihacengay a gangn. I kalalid tu HPV a imelang hawsa, zuma katalawan u HPV mikuwan tu p53, wng-mu-si-paw pucu' tan-pay tu pucu' mikuwan tu ci-ing, mahini sa malalid ku si-paw taneng milimek tu pikinsa, a yadah kunisuped, amalagang. pakala tu 25 a mang katukuh 100 a mang ku siimelangay a tatayna nu Amilika tu liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu', nika angangan u siimelangay a mihcaan i 25 katukuh 35 ku mihcaan. Ś§ßÁīĄ25Ťź¨Ťá≥100 25Ťá≥35ś≠≤. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ °. ********* r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° "kamu nu iŇč, " ¶…ôr*i ¶ar~…ĺ intra…ôpitńß…ôr~…ĺiar~…ĺ n…ôopr~…ĺasia, ¶in" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu u ¶ajaj ka tabaki r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan "kamu nu iŇč, ¶…ôr*i ¶ar~…ĺ djspr~…ĺasia" anu ¶aaj pu ¶u Ē~ ° a r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaana " ¶…ôr*i ¶ar~…ĺ int…ôrstitiar~…ĺ n…ôopr~…ĺasia", r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaana u ¶aja katabaki atu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaana masakinasaj a si-paw pur~…ĺuŇč nu ŇčaŇčan tu tizaaj a gaŇč, u sir~…ĺamitaj tu a gaŇč ajaw nu gaŇč a masumad. r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aaj ku gaŇč, tan…ôŇč a miŇčaaj. . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßatu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ °, nika ¶aaj kakatuud ku mar~…ĺa gaŇčaj a r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan. sakańßin u ¶in aŇčaŇčan makajniaj bajduk nu ta ¶u ¶uaj nu tad…ômaw tu "ńßp*" i r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan ńßajmaw satu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, mi ¶id…ô tar~…ĺakaw ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺid ** anu ¶aaj ** ńßp*. .** ¶in (ńßp*) ******ńßp*. i bwańßŇču saajawaj maazińß a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan pabaw nu baŇč…ôs a sipaw anu ¶aaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺaw ¶u Ē~ °, saa ¶a i r~…ĺabu a uzip nu tatajna ¶aaj kaazińß. i ńßp* akar~…ĺar~…ĺid zikuz tan…ôŇčn maazińß ku kasumad nu si-paw, mańßiniaj kutkutan ku si-paw "paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "makur~…ĺ…ômian ku si-paw" mańßiniaj maazińß tu ku kasumad a r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ °. r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° nikaawas tu pikinsa a maazińß, mańßiniaj maawas pa-s a nisasiŇč mikinsa tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan, ajaw a mikinsa ńßakaj u gaŇč. makinsa anu ¶aaj kakapaj, amibwańßŇču patabaki tu tawawaan, anu ¶aaj makaj uzip mik…ôr~…ĺit a mikinsa. .*ńßp* . r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ** r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan r~…ĺabuaj nu baŇč…ôs a pu ¶u Ē~ ° nikasumad nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sakas ńßaw masasibut, ujni a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mańßapinaŇč nu makajniaj u ar~…ĺip ńßanaj, mar~…ĺar~…ĺi "katar~…ĺawan" mańßiniaj u bajduk nu ta ¶u ¶uaj nu tad…ômaw, "mańßiniaj saka **,**,**,** kasańßini" nu tatajna, ńßinar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a tatajna ajaw nu ** ku mińß ¶aan nu tatajna siwawa. namańßini uzuma sakatar~…ĺawan amasumad ku r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan r~…ĺabuaj nu baŇč…ôs a pu ¶u Ē~ °, pasu mikudus tu uzip, katuud ku ¶abaj, ¶aaj pi ¶ukajmas tu paw-sj…ôn-taw, siuniŇč tu paŇč, katuud ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß, map…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan atu mitabaku. sakaj ¶ini nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, ¶aaj paisiŇč kapańßtu sa pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° amiŇčaaj. ujzasa u im…ôr~…ĺaŇča kapipaisiŇč tu, pad…ômiad…ôn amikinsa tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku su-paw-sj…ô atu mibwańßŇču mikinsa tu r~…ĺabu nu puki. anu i ** a bur~…ĺadan, ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kinapina ku pikiŇčsa masumad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu mikinsa, a mar~…ĺiŇčatu miŇčaaj. ** ¶in* . sakaj katuud ku tan…ôŇčaj a ma ¶unus ku ¶ajaj kaazińß, sisa pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu ¶ajaj kaazińß ku ka ¶unus atu sigaŇčaj, kar~…ĺamkam…ôn miŇčaaj, zuma pasu ¶ud…ôtaj ku sapituduńß, ńßanu diŇčki…ôn mituduńß, r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan u masaimur~…ĺuaj a akiti Ē~ ° nu diŇčki ku sapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° anu ¶aaj u ¶uja ku sapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan.sapiŇčaaj a imi u ńßp* jub ¶iwsia mitanam ńß…ônaj. r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶i ¶i Ē~ °…ôn miŇčaaj ńßakaj ¶aaj kasibir~…ĺi anu ¶aaj ¶aaj ka siwawa ma ¶unus ku katar~…ĺawan. ńßina asa r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb mar~…ĺagaŇč mańßiniaj makaj ar~…ĺip ku kasańßini. nika katuud ku patinakuan tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aaj paisiŇč…ôn kapańß satu. ¶ini nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj pakar~…ĺa tu **% p…ôs…ôn ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kapańßsatu, **% p…ôs…ôn i tusa a mińß ¶aan kapańßsau. pakar~…ĺa tu** % p…ôs…ôn ku ¶in* nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj i tusa a mińß ¶aan kapańßtu. pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj mar~…ĺagaŇč mańßiniaj par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ** a mińß ¶aan "* katukuńß ** a mińß ¶aan" ku d…ômiad. tańßkar~…ĺ ku nisur~…ĺitan, gaŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßakaj saajawaj mikinsa anu ¶aaj u ¶aaj ka im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj kaazińß, a pab…ôsut u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a gaŇčn. i kar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu ńßp* a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßawsa, zuma katar~…ĺawan u ńßp* mikuwan tu p**, wŇč-mu-si-paw pu ¶u Ē~ ° tan-paj tu pu ¶u Ē~ ° mikuwan tu ¶i-iŇč, mańßini sa mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku si-paw tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺim…ôk tu pikinsa, a jadańß kunisup…ôd, amar~…ĺagaŇč. pakar~…ĺa tu ** a maŇč katukuńß *** a maŇč ku siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tatajna nu amir~…ĺika tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ °, nika aŇčaŇčan u siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a mińß ¶aan i ** katukuńß ** ku mińß ¶aan. ********* ******. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu'. Śģģť†łšłäÁöģŚÖßÁė§ś®£ÁóÖŤģä liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' "kamu nu Ing, "Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia, CIN" singangan aca tu u cayay ka tabaki liel nu tawawaan "kamu nu Ing, cervical dysplasia" anucaay pucu' a liel nu tawawaana "cervical interstitial neoplasia", liel nu tawawaana u caya katabaki atu liel nu tawawaana masakinasay a si-paw pulung nu ngangan tu tizaay a gang, u silamitay tu a gang ayaw nu gang a masumad. liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' caay ku gang, taneng a mingaay. . nilaculan hatu liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu', nika caay kakatuud ku mala gangay a liel nu tawawaan. sakahin u CIN angangan makayniay bayduk nu tacucuay nu tademaw tu "HPV" i liel nu tawawaan haymaw satu malalid, micide talakaw ku kalalid 16 anucaay 18 HPV. .ŚľēŤĶ∑CIN (HPV) 16śąĖ18ŚěčHPV. i bwahngu saayaway maazih a imelang u liel nu tawawaan pabaw nu banges a sipaw anucaay hekal malawcu', saaca i labu a uzip nu tatayna caay kaazih. i HPV akalalid zikuz tanengn maazih ku kasumad nu si-paw, mahiniay kutkutan ku si-paw "pangangan han tu "makulemian ku si-paw" mahiniay maazih tu ku kasumad a liel nu tawawaan labuay a banges nu pucu'. liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' nikaawas tu pikinsa a maazih, mahiniay maawas pa-s a nisasing mikinsa tu liel nu tawawaan, ayaw a mikinsa hakay u gang. makinsa anu caay kakapay, amibwahngu patabaki tu tawawaan, anucaay makay uzip mikelit a mikinsa. .Śú®HPV . lalekalan nu imelang ÁóÖŚõ† liel nu tawawaan labuay nu banges a pucu' nikasumad nu imelang sakas haw masasibut, uyni a imelang mahapinang nu makayniay u alip hanay, malali "katalawan" mahiniay u bayduk nu tacucuay nu tademaw, "mahiniay saka 16,18,31,45 kasahini" nu tatayna, hinalaliday a tatayna ayaw nu 17 ku mihcaan nu tatayna siwawa. namahini uzuma sakatalawan amasumad ku liel nu tawawaan labuay nu banges a pucu', pasu mikudus tu uzip, katuud ku cabay, caay picukaymas tu paw-syen-taw, siuning tu pang, katuud ku nilecuh, mapela' ku liel nu tawawaan atu mitabaku. sakay CINI nu imelangay, caay paising kapahtu sa pacena' amingaay. uyzasa u imelanga kapipaising tu, pademiaden amikinsa tu liel nu tawawaan mapelu' ku su-paw-sye atu mibwahngu mikinsa tu labu nu puki. anu i 12 a buladan, caliway tu kinapina ku pikingsa masumad ku imelang kalalid tu mikinsa, a malingatu mingaay. ŚįćśĖľCIN1 . sakay katuud ku tanengay a macunus ku cayay kaazih, sisa pihacengay nu cayay kaazih ku kacunus atu sigangay, kalamkamen mingaay, zuma pasu cudetay ku sapituduh, hanu dingkien mituduh, liel nu tawawaan u masaimuluay a akiti' nu dingki ku sapicici' anucaay u cuya ku sapicici' tu liel nu tawawaan.sapingaay a imi u HPV yubciwsia mitanam henay. liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' cici'en mingaay hakay caay kasibili anucaay caay ka siwawa macunus ku katalawan. hina asa liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' kilul tu mangaleb malagang mahiniay makay alip ku kasahini. nika katuud ku patinakuan tu liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu' caay paisingen kapah satu. CINI nu imelangay pakala tu 70% pesen cacay a mihcaan kapahsatu, 90% pesen i tusa a mihcaan kapahsau. pakala tu50 % pesen ku CIN2 nu imelangay i tusa a mihcaan kapahtu. pihacengay malagang mahiniay palalecad 15 a mihcaan "3 katukuh 40 a mihcaan" ku demiad. tahkal ku nisulitan, gang a imelang hakay saayaway mikinsa anucaay u caay ka imelangay u cayay henay kaazih, a pabesut u pihacengay a gangn. I kalalid tu HPV a imelang hawsa, zuma katalawan u HPV mikuwan tu p53, wng-mu-si-paw pucu' tan-pay tu pucu' mikuwan tu ci-ing, mahini sa malalid ku si-paw taneng milimek tu pikinsa, a yadah kunisuped, amalagang. pakala tu 25 a mang katukuh 100 a mang ku siimelangay a tatayna nu Amilika tu liel nu tawawaan masumad ku labuay a banges nu pucu', nika angangan u siimelangay a mihcaan i 25 katukuh 35 ku mihcaan. Ś§ßÁīĄ25Ťź¨Ťá≥100 25Ťá≥35ś≠≤. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

satu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, mi ¶id…ô tar~…ĺakaw ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺid ** anu ¶aaj ** ńßp*. .** ¶in (ńßp*) ******ńßp*. i bwańßŇču saajawaj maazińß a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan pabaw nu baŇč…ôs a sipaw anu ¶aaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺaw ¶u Ē~ °, saa ¶a i r~…ĺabu a uzip nu tatajna ¶aaj kaazińß. i ńßp* akar~…ĺar~…ĺid zikuz tan…ôŇčn maazińß ku kasumad nu si-paw, mańßiniaj kutkutan ku si-paw "paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "makur~…ĺ…ômian ku si-paw" mańßiniaj maazińß tu ku kasumad a r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ °. r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° nikaawas tu pikinsa a maazińß, mańßiniaj maawas pa-s a nisasiŇč mikinsa tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan, ajaw a mikinsa ńßakaj u gaŇč. makinsa anu ¶aaj kakapaj, amibwańßŇču patabaki tu tawawaan, anu ¶aaj makaj uzip mik…ôr~…ĺit a mikinsa. .*ńßp* . r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ** r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan r~…ĺabuaj nu baŇč…ôs a pu ¶u Ē~ ° nikasumad nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sakas ńßaw masasibut, ujni a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mańßapinaŇč nu makajniaj u ar~…ĺip ńßanaj, mar~…ĺar~…ĺi "katar~…ĺawan" mańßiniaj u bajduk nu ta ¶u ¶uaj nu tad…ômaw, "mańßiniaj saka **,**,**,** kasańßini" nu tatajna, ńßinar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a tatajna ajaw nu ** ku mińß ¶aan nu tatajna siwawa. namańßini uzuma sakatar~…ĺawan amasumad ku r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan r~…ĺabuaj nu baŇč…ôs a pu ¶u Ē~ °, pasu mikudus tu uzip, katuud ku ¶abaj, ¶aaj pi ¶ukajmas tu paw-sj…ôn-taw, siuniŇč tu paŇč, katuud ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß, map…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan atu mitabaku. sakaj ¶ini nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, ¶aaj paisiŇč kapańßtu sa pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° amiŇčaaj. ujzasa u im…ôr~…ĺaŇča kapipaisiŇč tu, pad…ômiad…ôn amikinsa tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku su-paw-sj…ô atu mibwańßŇču mikinsa tu r~…ĺabu nu puki. anu i ** a bur~…ĺadan, ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kinapina ku pikiŇčsa masumad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu mikinsa, a mar~…ĺiŇčatu miŇčaaj. ** ¶in* . sakaj katuud ku tan…ôŇčaj a ma ¶unus ku ¶ajaj kaazińß, sisa pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu ¶ajaj kaazińß ku ka ¶unus atu sigaŇčaj, kar~…ĺamkam…ôn miŇčaaj, zuma pasu ¶ud…ôtaj ku sapituduńß, ńßanu diŇčki…ôn mituduńß, r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan u masaimur~…ĺuaj a akiti Ē~ ° nu diŇčki ku sapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° anu ¶aaj u ¶uja ku sapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan.sapiŇčaaj a imi u ńßp* jub ¶iwsia mitanam ńß…ônaj. r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶i ¶i Ē~ °…ôn miŇčaaj ńßakaj ¶aaj kasibir~…ĺi anu ¶aaj ¶aaj ka siwawa ma ¶unus ku katar~…ĺawan. ńßina asa r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb mar~…ĺagaŇč mańßiniaj makaj ar~…ĺip ku kasańßini. nika katuud ku patinakuan tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aaj paisiŇč…ôn kapańß satu. ¶ini nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj pakar~…ĺa tu **% p…ôs…ôn ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan kapańßsatu, **% p…ôs…ôn i tusa a mińß ¶aan kapańßsau. pakar~…ĺa tu** % p…ôs…ôn ku ¶in* nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj i tusa a mińß ¶aan kapańßtu. pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj mar~…ĺagaŇč mańßiniaj par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ** a mińß ¶aan "* katukuńß ** a mińß ¶aan" ku d…ômiad. tańßkar~…ĺ ku nisur~…ĺitan, gaŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßakaj saajawaj mikinsa anu ¶aaj u ¶aaj ka im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj kaazińß, a pab…ôsut u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj a gaŇčn. i kar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu ńßp* a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßawsa, zuma katar~…ĺawan u ńßp* mikuwan tu p**, wŇč-mu-si-paw pu ¶u Ē~ ° tan-paj tu pu ¶u Ē~ ° mikuwan tu ¶i-iŇč, mańßini sa mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku si-paw tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺim…ôk tu pikinsa, a jadańß kunisup…ôd, amar~…ĺagaŇč. pakar~…ĺa tu ** a maŇč katukuńß *** a maŇč ku siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tatajna nu amir~…ĺika tu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ nu tawawaan masumad ku r~…ĺabuaj a baŇč…ôs nu pu ¶u Ē~ °, nika aŇčaŇčan u siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a mińß ¶aan i ** katukuńß ** ku mińß ¶aan. ********* ******. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
